title: Customs and Excise (Excise Duty) (Suspension) (Ethyl Alcohol) Regulations, 2019

sections.heading: (1 ) These Regulations may be cited as the Customs and Title
sections.text:
(1 ) These Regulations may be cited as the Customs and Title
Excise (Excise Duty) (Suspension) (Ethyl Alcohol) Regulations,

sections.heading: (2) These Regulations are deemed to have come into effect
sections.text:
(2) These Regulations are deemed to have come into effect
on 25th September, 2019.

sections.heading: (1 ) The Excise Duty on goods listed in the Schedule is Suspension
sections.text:
(1 ) The Excise Duty on goods listed in the Schedule is Suspension
of excise
suspended to the extent shown in the Schedule.
duty
(2) A suspension of duty on the goods specified in the Schedule
shall be granted when manufactured or produced in Zambia.
(3) These Regulations shall cease to have effect on 31st
December, 2019.
